beats.what: A man in a blue shirt and shorts runs from left to right across the running track.
The man continues running across the track, moving from the left side toward the right.
The man continues his sprint, passing the lane markings.
The man continues running toward the right side of the frame.
The man continues running, moving further toward the right edge of the frame.
The man continues running across the track until he exits the frame on the right.

formal.text: A man in blue attire enters the frame from the left.
The subject maintains a steady pace across the track.
The subject passes the lane markings.
The subject continues his lateral movement.
The subject approaches the right edge of the frame.
The subject exits the frame to the right.

sarcastic.text: A truly breathtaking display of cardio begins.
Look at that blistering pace. Absolutely electric.
He is definitely winning this race against himself.
Still running. The momentum is truly staggering.
The sheer athleticism is almost too much to handle.
And he exits, leaving us all in his dust.

humorous_tech.text: Me running away from a critical production bug.
The bug is gaining on me.
No amount of refactoring can save me now.
Deploying to production was a mistake.

humorous_non_tech.text: He's running like he left the oven on.
Still running. Definitely left the oven on.
He is really committed to that burnt toast.
The toast is definitely toast at this point.
Faster! The smoke alarm is calling his name!
And he's gone to save the kitchen.
